actions.action: Resolve schema_violation: 'motor_channel_peak_current_a' is a required property

Resolve schema_violation: [{'id': 'ASM-01', 'text': 'External QSPI flash required — RP2040 has no on-chip flash', 'rationale': 'RP2040 XIP (execute-in-place) boots from external SPI flash via QSPI; W25Q16JV selected for 2MB capacity'}, {'id': 'ASM-02', 'text': 'USB-C connector bus-powers the board at 5V; AP2112K LDO provides 3.3V', 'rationale': 'RP2040 core voltage 1.1V generated internally via VREG; only 3.3V IO rail needs external LDO'}, {'id': 'ASM-03', 'text': '12MHz crystal optional — RP2040 ROSC can run USB PLL; crystal improves frequency accuracy', 'rationale': 'RP2040 USB PLL can lock to 48MHz from ROSC, but USB spec requires ±2500ppm; crystal locks within ±20ppm'}, {'id': 'ASM-04', 'text': 'PIO state machines can implement additional protocols (WS2812, UART, SPI, I2S) in firmware', 'rationale': 'RP2040 has two PIO blocks with 8 state machines; eliminates need for external protocol ICs'}] is not of type 'object'
